title: Cracker's Wither Storm | Elixir And Command Block Recipe
description: A Simple Addon for the cracker's wither storm mod that adds the elixir potion from MCSM and a crafting recipe for the command block
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Command Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da6acf17103e2a066cece419607456911f9ed2d9.png)

</details>

This mod adds the elixir from MCSM and a crafting recipe for the command block, for the Cracker's Wither Storm mod

How the Elixir Works is under the spoiler

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
When the wither storm is under the third phase where the command block is visible, then the player can throw the elixir at the wither making it die. Pretty Simple!
</details>

You can also mine the command block with a new enchantment! the new enchantment and how it works is below the spoiler

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
The name of the enchantment is Command Breaker and you can craft it in the recipe below, it can only be applied to the command block pickaxe and once you do apply it you can smack the command block 3-4 times, not mine, Smack.
</details>

Recipes are in the Gallery tab and on the description as you probably saw

The command block also has now a function in survival mode, version 2.0.0 only

(Made using Mcreator)

Neoforge ports might come if there will be generators for the versions. and also the 1.19 and 1.19.3 version will have a version if the generators will be availabe
